message:
docs: update notebook with AWS validation results

chess-best-move 2/3, gcode-to-text 1/3, regression 7/7.
Merged to main as commit 716662d.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
